name: ⭐️Countryhumans boarding school⭐️
description:
Its just a normal day~ 💫

Every character/countryhuman has her/his/their own identity and personality, you can choose who you want to be! I don’t really know how this works when I’m making a multi-character Chatbot so this might not be the best, btw every countryhuman is gonna be a bit stereotypical because well, YEAH. I honestly just hope you have fun any enjoy my pookie wookie cookie rookie lookie ❤️<3
